about.title: About Us
about.intro: Located in Khambhat, Sunrise Agro Process is a modern rice milling company dedicated to delivering high-quality, naturally processed rice to wholesalers. With more than 15 years of industry experience, we combine advanced milling technology with strong farmer relationships to provide consistent quality at competitive pricing.
about.intro2: Our facility in Anand District processes carefully selected paddy sourced from farmers, APMC markets, and trusted suppliers to produce premium Sortex-clean rice for the wholesale market.
about.story: Sunrise Agro Process was established in 2021 as a modern upgrade to years of experience in the rice industry. The company was founded by Mr. Rajesh Thakkar and Mr. Kinjal Fadiya, who together bring over 15 years of experience in rice trading and processing. The company was created with a clear goal: To become one of the most trusted rice milling companies by delivering natural, high-quality rice at reasonable prices.
about.technology: Technology: Milltech Milling Machinery & QED Sortex Technology
about.missionText: To supply natural, high-quality rice while maintaining long-term relationships with farmers and customers through fair pricing, transparency, and modern milling technology.

founders.label: Leadership
founders.title: Meet Our Founders
founders.subtitle: The visionaries behind Sunrise Agro Process — combining decades of rice industry expertise

rajesh.name: Mr. Rajesh Thakkar
rajesh.desc: Mr. Rajesh Thakkar brings over 15 years of experience in the rice industry, specializing in rice quality assessment, sales, and milling operations. Alongside Sunrise Agro Process, he successfully manages three rice trading companies dealing in bulk raw paddy and rice, giving him deep market knowledge. Known for his strong decision-making, quality focus, and leadership in factory operations, he plays a key role in maintaining consistent product standards.

kinjal.name: Mr. Kinjal Fadiya
kinjal.desc: Mr. Kinjal Fadiya has more than 10 years of experience in rice procurement and business management within the grain industry. He oversees raw material purchasing, supplier coordination, and final product supervision to ensure smooth production flow. With strong business management skills, confidence, and market understanding, he contributes significantly to operational efficiency and company growth.

process.title: Our Milling Process
process.subtitle: Modern Rice Milling Process to Maintain Natural Quality

steps.name: Paddy Procurement
steps.desc: Paddy is sourced from local farmers, APMC markets (Khambhat), government online tenders, local dealers and nearby villages.

steps.name: Cleaning & De-Stoning
steps.desc: Raw paddy is cleaned to remove dust, stones, and impurities for a pure base material.

steps.name: Milling Process
steps.desc: Using advanced Milltech milling machinery, the paddy is carefully processed to maintain grain strength and minimize breakage.

steps.name: Sortex Color Sorting
steps.desc: Our QED Sortex machine removes defective grains and ensures uniform color and premium quality.

steps.name: Packaging
steps.desc: Finished rice is packed in durable PP bags (30kg & 50kg) for wholesale distribution.

services.title: Why Choose Us
services.subtitle: What Sets Sunrise Agro Process Apart

list.name: Advanced Sortex Cleaning
list.desc: QED Sortex technology removes impurities and ensures premium quality grains with uniform color.
list.details: Our QED Sortex machine uses high-resolution cameras and optical sensors to detect and remove discolored grains, stones, and foreign particles. Each grain passes through multiple stages of optical sorting to deliver consistently clean output that meets wholesale quality standards.

list.name: Milltech Milling Machinery
list.desc: Advanced milling technology that maintains grain strength and minimizes breakage for superior quality.
list.details: Our Milltech milling machinery is designed for precision rice processing. The advanced engineering maintains the natural grain structure while achieving optimal milling recovery. This results in stronger, more uniform grains that command premium wholesale prices.

list.name: Direct Farmer Relationships
list.desc: Strong partnerships with local farmers ensure quality paddy sourcing at fair prices.
list.details: We source directly from local farmers, APMC markets, and trusted suppliers. Our 15+ years of relationships in the industry ensure we get the best quality paddy at competitive prices, which we pass on to our wholesale customers.

list.name: Competitive Wholesale Pricing
list.desc: Efficient operations and direct sourcing enable the most competitive prices for bulk buyers.
list.details: Our efficient milling operations, direct farmer sourcing, and strategic location on Khambhat-Dharmaj Highway minimize overhead costs. We pass these savings to our wholesale customers with competitive pricing structures for bulk orders.

list.name: Consistent Quality Supply
list.desc: 35 tons daily milling capacity with large storage ensures year-round availability.
list.details: With a daily milling capacity of 35 tons and large storage facilities for both paddy and finished rice, we maintain consistent stock availability. Our efficient loading and dispatch system ensures timely delivery to wholesalers across the region.

list.name: Quality Certifications
list.desc: FSSAI Certified and ZED Bronze Certified facility ensuring food safety and quality manufacturing.
list.details: Our facility holds FSSAI Certification for food safety compliance and ZED Bronze Certification for quality manufacturing practices. These certifications reflect our commitment to maintaining the highest standards in rice processing and food safety.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common Questions About Our Products & Services

list.a: Sortex is an advanced color sorting technology that removes discolored grains, stones, and foreign particles using optical sensors. We use QED Sortex technology to ensure you receive only premium quality, pure grains.

list.q: What are your minimum order quantities?
list.a: We cater to wholesale and bulk orders. All rice is available in 30kg and 50kg PP bags. For specific requirements and pricing, please contact us at +91 8200101235 or +91 9913895993.

list.q: What rice varieties do you produce?
list.a: We produce Wadakolam (including Old, Poniya, Vatla), Kali Muchh, Gujarat-13, Gujarat-17, Krishna Kamod, and Lachkari rice varieties. We also supply MP Sharbati Wheat, Bhaliya Wheat, and Green Gold Bajri.
All our rice products are packed in durable 30kg and 50kg PP bags suitable for wholesale distribution. Custom requirements can be discussed for large orders.

list.q: What milling technology do you use?
list.a: We use advanced Milltech milling machinery for rice processing and QED Sortex technology for color sorting. Our daily milling capacity is 35 tons.
We are located at 36/1 Chhatardi, Khambhat–Dharmaj Highway, Khambhat, Dist. Anand, Gujarat – 388640. Our strategic highway location enables efficient transportation and logistics.
